Localization.Description: An attempt was detected to create a local or domain account and add it to the local administrators group

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} attempted to create a domain account {object.account.name} and add it to the local administrators group on host {event_src.host}.
An attempt by user {subject.account.name} to create the domain account {object.account.name} is detected on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} attempted to create a local account {object.account.name} and add it to the local administrators group on host {event_src.host}.
An attempt by user {subject.account.name} to create the local account {object.account.name} is detected on host {event_src.host}
